name: browser-control
description: Stop feeding your agent raw HTML. BrowserControl gives LLMs true visual grounding with Set of Marks (SoM), letting them click exactly what they see without hallucinating selectors. With built-in developer tools, session recording, and persistent logins, it transforms web automation from a brittle guessing game into a reliable, human-like capability. Give your agent eyes, not just code.
